chunks.title: Esther's Petition Revealed
chunks.reason: The king invites Esther to speak her mind and she reveals the crisis facing her people.

chunks.title: Identification of the Enemy
chunks.reason: The king asks who is responsible and Esther identifies Haman as the adversary.

chunks.title: Haman's Desperation
chunks.reason: The king leaves in anger while Haman pleads with Esther and is caught off guard.

chunks.title: Haman's Execution
chunks.reason: A eunuch points out the gallows and the king orders Haman to be hanged on them.
